Representing Architects Representing Consumers Member Member Member Member • NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 26th April, 2002 S. 0. 1472. In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-sections (1) and (2) of Section 4 of the Fnergy Con- servation Act, 7001 (52 of 2001), the Central Government hereby establihes the Governing Council of the Bureau of Energy Efficiency and appoints the following Members of the Governing Council of the said Bureau, namely Appointed under clauses (a) to (n) of Sub-section (2) of Section 4 :— 1. The Minister of Power 2. The Secretary to the Government of India, Ministry of Power. New Delhi 3. The Secretary to the Government of India, Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas, New Delhi. 4. The Secretary to the Government of India, Ministry of Coal, New Delhi 5. The Secretary to the Government of India, Ministry of Non-Conventional Energy Sources, New Delhi. 6. The Secretary to the Government of India, Department of Atomic Energy. New Delhi. 7. The Secretary to the Government of India, Department of Consumer Affairs. New Delhi. 8. The chairman, Central Electricity Authority, New Delhi 9. The Directbr General, Central Power Research Institute, New Delhi 10. Executive Director, Petroleum Conservation Research Association, New Delhi I I. Chairman-cum-Managing Director, Central Mine Planning and Design Institute Limited, Ranchi. 12. Director-General, Bureau of Indian Standards, New Delhi i3. Director-General, National Test House. Department of Supply. Ministry of Commerce and Industry, Kolkata. 14. Managing Director, Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency Limited. New Delhi. Appointed under clause (o) of Sub-section (2) 15. The Chairman, North-Easter'n Regional Electricity Board. 16. The Chairman, Eastern Regional Electricity Board. 17. The Chairman, North Regional Electricity Board. I S. The Chairman, Western Regional Electricity Board. 19. The Chairman, Southern Regional Electricity Board. date they enter upon the office :- Appointed under clause (p) of Sub-section (2) 20. Shri Tarun Das, Director-General, Confedera- tion of Indian Industries, New'Delhi. )1. Shri Sunil Paresh More, Secretary General, Indian Electrical and Electronics Manufac- turers' Association, Mumbai. 22. Shri.Shashi Prabliu, 12–A, Ameyanand, Kashinath Dhuru Road, Mumbai. 23. Shri Ashish Kulkarni, Building 64/1496, MIG Colony, Marsha Nagar, Worli, Mumbai. Appointed under clause (q) of Sub-section (2) of Section 4 for a period of three years from the date they enter upon the office.:---- 24. 25.
